name: player_season_projected_points range year_offset reduces over the offset window via a valid table re-scan
description: player_season_projected_points with year=[2023] + range year_offset=[1,2] reduces the offset window with a correlated-aggregate subquery that re-scans projections_index directly (source.table) and scores it in-query, pinned to year IN (2024,2025) plus the sourceid/week/seas_type discriminators. Previously emitted invalid SQL referencing an unjoined alias.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT SUM(ROUND((COALESCE(projections_index.passing_attempts, 0) * 0 + COALESCE(projections_index.passing_completions, 0) * 0 + COALESCE(projections_index.passing_yards, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(projections_index.passing_interceptions, 0) * -1 + COALESCE(projections_index.passing_touchdowns, 0) * 4 + COALESCE(projections_index.rushing_attempts, 0) * 0 + COALESCE(projections_index.rushing_yards, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(projections_index.rushing_touchdowns, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(projections_index.fumbles_lost, 0) * -1 + COALESCE(projections_index.targets, 0) * 0 + COALESCE(projections_index.receptions, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.receiving_yards, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(projections_index.receiving_touchdowns, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(projections_index.two_point_conversions, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(projections_index.punt_return_touchdowns, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(projections_index.kickoff_return_touchdowns, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(projections_index.extra_points_made, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.field_goals_made_0_19_yards, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(projections_index.field_goals_made_20_29_yards, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(projections_index.field_goals_made_30_39_yards, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(projections_index.field_goals_made_40_49_yards, 0) * 4 + COALESCE(projections_index.field_goals_made_50_plus_yards, 0) * 5 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_sacks, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_interceptions, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_forced_fumbles, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_recovered_fumbles, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_three_and_outs, 0) * 1 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_fourth_down_stops, 0) * 1 + GREATEST(COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_points_against, 0) - 20, 0) * -0.4 + GREATEST(COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_yards_against, 0) - 300, 0) * -0.02 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_blocked_kicks, 0) * 3 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_safeties, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_two_point_returns, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(projections_index.defensive_touchdowns, 0) * 6), 2)) FROM projections_index WHERE projections_index.pid = player.pid AND projections_index.year IN (2024,2025) AND projections_index.sourceid = 18 AND projections_index.week = 0 AND projections_index.seas_type = 'REG') AS "season_projected_points_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
